title: Universal Cognitive Schema
description: Open standard for portable AI identity across platforms. Version 0.1.0-alpha.

ucs_version.description: Version of the UCS schema this profile conforms to.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for this cognitive profile. Generated at creation, never changes.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this profile was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to any dimension.

persona.description: Core communication identity — how this person naturally expresses themselves.

communication_style.description: Dominant mode of communication preferred by the user.

formality.description: Formality level. 0.0 = fully casual, 1.0 = fully formal.

primary.description: BCP-47 language tag for primary language.

others.description: Additional languages the user works in.

expertise_map.description: Domains of knowledge — what the user knows and at what depth.

depth.description: Self-assessed or inferred depth of knowledge in this domain.

last_active.description: When this domain was last actively engaged.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about this domain expertise.

project_graph.description: Active and archived projects the user works on with AI assistance.

preference_corpus.description: Output and interaction preferences — how the user wants AI to respond.

response_length.description: Preferred default length of AI responses.

code_language_preferences.description: Preferred programming languages, in order of preference.

citation_style.description: Preferred citation style when AI references sources.

avoid.description: Explicit things the user has asked AI to avoid.

custom.description: Freeform key-value store for preferences not covered by the standard fields.

interaction_patterns.description: Observed patterns from how this user interacts with AI systems.

typical_prompt_style.description: Characterisation of how the user typically frames their prompts.
typical_prompt_style.example: Short, context-rich instructions with implied assumptions.

common_corrections.description: Things the user frequently corrects AI on.

reinforced_behaviours.description: Behaviours the user has positively reinforced.

rejected_behaviours.description: Behaviours the user has explicitly rejected.

trust_boundaries.description: What level of autonomy and action this user is comfortable delegating to AI.

autonomous_action_tolerance.description: How comfortable the user is with AI taking action without confirmation.

preferred_confirmation_frequency.description: How often the user wants AI to check in before proceeding.

sensitive_domains.description: Topics or task types requiring extra care or explicit confirmation.

temporal_context.description: Time-aware metadata — how the profile evolves and how history is weighted.

recency_weight.description: How heavily recent interactions are weighted vs older history. 1.0 = only recent matters, 0.0 = all equally weighted.

life_chapters.description: Explicit periods the user has marked as distinct phases of their AI usage.

to.description: End of this chapter. Null if currently active.

active.description: Whether this is the current active chapter.

extensions.description: Platform-specific or community extension namespaces. Must not conflict with core UCS fields. Implementations must ignore unknown extensions rather than erroring.

provenance.description: Metadata about how this profile was created and verified.

source_platforms.description: Platforms from which data was extracted to build this profile.

extraction_method.description: How the source data was obtained.

sanitised.description: Whether this profile has passed sanitisation to remove prompt-injection patterns. MUST be true for any profile shared with a destination platform.

fidelity.description: Per-dimension confidence scores indicating how reliably each dimension was captured.

attestation_signature.description: Cryptographic signature attesting that this profile has passed sanitisation and provenance verification. Format: base64-encoded.

context_summary.description: Distilled context — what an AI needs to know to assist with this project.
